title: McpServerConfig
description: MCP server configuration (spec §5). One MCP server's identity + transport + optional per-server auth-secret reference. Two transport variants — stdio (local subprocess JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout) and http (remote streamable HTTP per MCP specification 2025-11-25). Stage C lifecycle holds one config per registered server in the `mcp_servers` SQLite table. Per CLAUDE.md §14 schema-as-source-of-truth: Rust types in `crates/runtime-core/src/generated/mcp.rs` + TS types in `src/types/mcp.ts` regenerate from this file.

auth_secret_ref.title: AuthSecretRef
auth_secret_ref.description: OS-keychain key identifier for per-server authentication secrets; null for unauthenticated servers. Stage C wires the per-server keychain surface via `runtime-main::key_store`. The string format is `mcp.<server-name>` by convention; the runtime owns the namespace, the schema is permissive (any non-empty string).

McpServerName.title: McpServerName
McpServerName.description: Server identifier — lowercase alphanumeric + hyphen, 1–64 chars. Used as the namespace prefix in §5a tool resolution (`<server>__<tool>`). Pattern matches DNS-label conventions; first character must be alphanumeric (no leading hyphens).

McpTransport.title: McpTransport
McpTransport.description: Transport variant — stdio (local subprocess via JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout, suitable for `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` and similar local servers) or http (remote streamable HTTP per MCP specification 2025-11-25). Discriminated by the `type` field per gotcha #26 (struct-shape variants required for serde(tag)).

args.description: Command-line arguments passed after the executable name.

env.description: Environment variables set for the subprocess. Inherits from parent unless an env key is explicitly overridden here.

cwd.description: Working directory for the subprocess. null = inherit from parent.

url.description: Streamable-HTTP endpoint URL (per MCP specification 2025-11-25). HTTPS endpoints use rustls TLS (configured via the workspace reqwest pin).

McpServerStatus.title: McpServerStatus
McpServerStatus.description: Runtime status of an MCP server connection. Surfaced by §5 lifecycle (Stage C) and rendered by the MCPNode (Stage E). Transitions: `disconnected → health_pending → connected` on add; `connected → error` on transport failure; `error → health_pending → connected` on auto-reconnect.
